caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap with a gold design, is seated in a recording studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. A gold chain with a pendant is visible around his neck. In the background, a white wall features a logo with the word "HUSTLE" and several gold stars. To his right, a screen displays the text "BOSS TALK 101." On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and the text "BOSS TALK 101." The man's t-shirt has the phrase "CHECK IT!" printed on the front. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, speaking and slightly shifting his head and facial expression while looking toward someone off-screen. The lighting and camera angle remain consistent throughout the scene.
